scripts.check: node --check api/tts.js && node --check assets/js/speech-service.js && node --check assets/js/theme-preferences.js && node --check assets/js/vip-user.js && node --check assets/js/admin-super.js && node --check lesson-config.js && node --check lesson-engine.js && node --check lesson-page.js && npm run check:pinyin && node scripts/build-writing-content.mjs --check && npm run test:writing && npm run test:vip
scripts.check:pinyin: node --check assets/js/pinyin-intro.js && node --check tools/build-pinyin-audio.mjs && node tools/build-pinyin-audio.mjs --verify-only
scripts.test:audio: npm run check:audio-inventory && npm run check:audio-static && npm run audit:audio-coverage
